label: Update & Maintain
description: For businesses that already have a website

default.subject: {{NAME}}'s website could be winning more customers
default.body:
Your Website Could Be Working Harder

Small improvements that make a big difference to your online results

Hi {{NAME}},

I came across {{NAME}} while researching local businesses in {{CITY}} and took a look at your website. an outdated or poorly maintained site can quietly cost you customers — visitors who can't find your current hours, see old pricing, or land on a page that doesn't load properly on mobile will simply move on to a competitor.

✓ Content updates — hours, prices, services and promotions always up to date
✓ Mobile & speed optimisation — fast, smooth experience on every device
✓ Security & backups — regular patches, SSL certificate, automated backups
✓ Google & AI SEO upkeep — stay discoverable on Google Search and AI assistants like ChatGPT for {{CITY}}
✓ Google Business sync — keep your Maps listing consistent with your site
✓ Monthly report — clear overview of traffic, rankings and performance

We'd be happy to do a free 15-minute review of {{NAME}}'s current site — honest feedback, no hard sell.

Book a Free Website Review

Looking forward to hearing from you,

Best regards,
The WebPower Team

WebPower Team

Digital Solutions for Local Businesses
